{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Zenith
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Engineer]] has been obsessed with finding the [[Zenith]] since she was a girl.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
